MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-12-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT 22 BATTERY STREET, INC., HYPERBARIC MEDICAL SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

Defendants Hyperbaric Medical Services LLC and 22 Battery Street, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendants' alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied as to the second cause of action for foreclosure of mechanic's line and granted as to the third and fourth causes of action for common count and quantum meruit. Defendants have not shown that they are entitled to prevail on the mechanic's lien claim because: (1) there is a triable dispute when the work was completed (Fox Dec., par.5), (2) the proof of service that defendants cite to argue that the preliminary notice was served in an untimely fashion does not refer to a "preliminary notice"; and (3) the alleged preliminary notice that is purportedly substantively deficient is clearly a document that is unrelated to this case. The court does not address the new arguments that defendants raise in their reply brief. Defendants are entitled to prevail on the common count and quantum meruit claims per Truestone, Inc. v. Simi West Industrial Park (1984) 163 Cal.App.3d 715, 724. The undisputed facts show that defendants did not communicate with or mislead United Mechanical and they were not unjustly enriched since Hyperbaric paid MW Logic, Inc. for the work.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
